description_long: This is a large, freestanding office hutch desk made primarily of dark wood with contrasting light gray accent panels. The front features a spacious work surface, multiple storage compartments including two cabinets with doors, three drawers, and several open shelves above and to the sides. The upper hutch section provides additional shelving and closed storage, supported by metal rods. The sides are solid and flat, with a subtle wood grain texture, and the entire unit sits on small caster wheels for mobility. The back is mostly flat with a central open section, likely for cable management or access. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for use in an office, study, or reception area.
description: A large, modern office hutch desk with dark wood finish, light gray accents, multiple shelves, cabinets, and drawers, designed for workspace organization.
description_view_0: Rear view showing a flat back panel with a central open section and light gray accent band.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the depth, solid wood grain panel, and the profile of the hutch and desk.
description_view_2: Front view revealing the main workspace, open shelves, two cabinets, three drawers, and upper hutch storage.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile and solid wood grain panel.
